textByHash.02a4e2edc1af8f6dddbce1e9ef5124ae00ef288d: Thank you, thank you. I'm very grateful.
textByHash.0a1b031dc6c21cae29d1cfa889f09c70352dc839: Yes yes, I suppose it is a quest. My fiance Ernest and I came upon this house.
textByHash.4aee431ac1dc19ba047b76e70f9db96d8fb902e4: My poor darling, why must these things happen to us.
textByHash.97a44f8355db26996643b90b3dd36631c502fdf0: I know he's not exactly brave but I think you're being a bit harsh.
textByHash.a77c1b470e73790cb7ade30c5c7124cdb1c409f1: Seeing as we were a little lost Ernest decided to go in and ask for directions.
textByHash.b4b5f8c1252cb9a0b3d1465af3dda179a03377f5: That was an hour ago. That house looks spooky, can you go and see if you can find him for me?
textByHash.bc1e225b30bd826aa7f49a4064d411bcc7b13b19: Oh he went off to talk to some green warty guy. I'm sure he'll be back soon.
textByHash.ca7c45b78218844abb6ee3302a7735c4b5a10cad: Can you please help me? I'm in a terrible spot of trouble.
textByHash.e6f1c80786566681e75be3ea1e163e6e5560c6de: Well be quick, I'm sure being a chicken can't be good for him.
textByHash.e7c5f8031cf5d05cb8cbb8de4d408b5f98848e56: Have you found my sweetheart yet?
